title: Concept Extraction
description: Phase 1 output — distilled signal from raw input

true_objective.description: What is actually being built, stripped of framing and marketing language. One sentence.

system_category.description: The primary system type being built.

operational_goals.description: What the system must accomplish to be considered working. Measurable where possible.

explicit.description: Constraints stated directly in the input.

implied.description: Constraints not stated but clearly implied by context, platform, or scope.

hidden_assumptions.description: Assumptions embedded in the input that have not been validated. Each should be surfaced as an OPEN ITEM if unresolvable.

out_of_scope.description: What this system is definitively NOT. Prevents scope creep during build.
